content.text:
MORNING KPI BRIEF (as of 2026-03-21 18:45 CT)

Yesterday (Fri 2026-03-20)
1) **Booked calls (primary KPI):** 0  
2) **Speed-to-lead (median / p95):** N/A / N/A (no valid response-time samples captured)  
3) **Leads created:** 2  
4) **Opportunities moved stages:** 0  
5) **Stale leads >24h:** 6

Last 7 days (2026-03-14 to 2026-03-20)
1) **Booked calls:** 0 total (0.0/day)  
2) **Speed-to-lead (median / p95):** N/A / N/A (insufficient tracked samples)  
3) **Leads created:** 3 total (0.43/day)  
4) **Opportunities moved stages:** 4 total (0.57/day)  
5) **Stale leads >24h:** 6 current backlog

Top 3 blockers
1) **No call bookings** despite new lead inflow (top-of-funnel not converting to appointments).  
2) **Response-time KPI visibility gap** (cannot compute speed reliably from current message/event data).  
3) **Aging lead backlog** (6 leads >24h) likely suppressing conversion velocity.

Top 3 actions for today
1) **Backlog blitz (priority):** clear all 6 stale leads with same-day personalized outreach + booking CTA.  
2) **Booking conversion push:** deploy a short 2-touch “book now” sequence to all open recent leads (value + urgency + direct calendar link).  
3) **Instrumentation fix:** enforce first-response timestamp capture on every new inbound lead so median/p95 speed-to-lead is reportable tomorrow.
